title: Poetical Inscription For An Altar To Independence.
content:
Thou of an independent mind,
        With soul resolv'd, with soul resign'd;
        Prepar'd Power's proudest frown to brave,
        Who wilt not be, nor have a slave;
        Virtue alone who dost revere,
        Thy own reproach alone dost fear,
        Approach this shrine, and worship here.
meaning:
Robert Burns's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Poetical Inscription For An Altar To Independence."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
